title: P31 Universal DELTA Language
epigraph: A small vocabulary for one institution, one sky, many altitudes. Easy to pick up; never finished; felt before it is optimized.

mnemonic.DELTA: Differential Embodied Language of Threshold and Affect — a handle, not a trademark. The math symbol Δ still means change; here it also means closed loop and return.
mnemonic.note: If the mnemonic ever fights the geometry, the geometry (Wye → Delta, K₄, one sky) wins.

anchors.label: Same void
anchors.definition: Layer 1 is one institution’s quiet floor — Gray Rock, no performative brand on first paint.

anchors.label: Same sky
anchors.definition: One night field; teal/coral/hearth are one family; moving between seeds is change of altitude, not product-switching.

anchors.label: No jarring cut
anchors.definition: Transitions feel like walking rooms in one building — ribbon, starfield layer, typography stay kin; no surprise light/dark whiplash without warning.

terms.label: void
terms.definition: The undifferentiated ground — background, not noise. In UI: Gray Rock base before Alive.

terms.label: sky
terms.definition: The shared visual field across surfaces — not a component, the hemisphere you navigate.

terms.label: altitude
terms.definition: How much of the system you see at once — hub = wide; bond = tight. Not a different product.

terms.label: window
terms.definition: Any seed or page — a viewport onto the same sky, not a separate app icon in the head.

terms.label: room
terms.definition: A coherent affordance space with a host mind; you walk, you don’t teleport.

terms.label: walk
terms.definition: A transition that preserves sky/void continuity; opposite of a jarring cut.

terms.label: jarring cut
terms.definition: When the user feels they changed apps; fix with shared sky, ribbon, and motion discipline.

terms.label: Layer 1
terms.definition: Void / Gray Rock — default calm, no brand flex on first paint.

terms.label: Layer 1.5
terms.definition: Starfield stratum — luminance atmosphere between void and Alive; weather, not logo.

terms.label: Layer 2
terms.definition: Alive — interaction, focus, handoff; still one building.

terms.label: Gray Rock
terms.definition: Default steady state — cloud text, void field, no rush to reward.

terms.label: Alive
terms.definition: Interactive engagement — brand chroma and motion enter with intent, not on autopilot hijack.

terms.label: hearth
terms.definition: Where warmth pools — BONDING, family tone, care without dashboardization.

terms.label: starfield
terms.definition: Ambient mesh — optional, pausable, respects reduced motion; static plate in breaker rooms.

terms.label: instrument glass
terms.definition: Command center / desk mode — same stars, lower motion; precision, not mood loop.

terms.label: bridge
terms.definition: A linked reading order between lenses — e.g. poet ↔ physicist, same K₄, different diction.

terms.label: translate
terms.definition: Explicit affordance to re-read the same truth in another mind’s dialect.

terms.label: host mind
terms.definition: Which mind owns the first screen — Poet, Physicist, Operator, Builder, Parent/Gate.

terms.label: return ribbon
terms.definition: Fixed spine: soup · hub · passport · connection · mesh — never reorder; AuDHD-safe exits.

terms.label: Wye (Y)
terms.definition: Branchy stress topology — one center, three arms; open, divergent, higher tension.

terms.label: Delta (Δ)
terms.definition: Closed three-phase loop — resilient run; the operator’s return path; not ‘triangle’ as toy shape.

terms.label: K₄
terms.definition: Complete graph on four vertices — the cage; family mesh; remove one, rigidity can remain in the triangle (K₃).

terms.label: edge
terms.definition: A relationship segment — load path, not decoration.

terms.label: vertex
terms.definition: A person, pillar, or dock point — not a ‘user node’ in growth-hack copy.

terms.label: mesh
terms.definition: The family/community substrate — Durable, honest latency, not omniscience.

terms.label: cage
terms.definition: K₄ family container — love totals, explicit boundaries, not a panopticon metaphor.

terms.label: verify
terms.definition: The respect bar — ordered checks, no vibe-substitute for fact when a fact is claimable.

terms.label: ship bar
terms.definition: The same ordered proof ladder — one institution’s rhythm of ship.

terms.label: CONNECTION
terms.definition: Deploy and ecosystem spine — not ‘networking’; wiring you can audit.

terms.label: ephemeralization
terms.definition: One source, many surfaces — no parallel lore; Fuller discipline.

forbidden.avoid: Submarine / fleet command metaphors for people
Growth-hack, streak shame, FOMO hooks in mission tone
Treating every page as a separate brand

allowed: Same bowl, different closeness, not a leaderboard
Static star plate — same sky, precision room
Whitelist, no shell — respect as architecture
Quiet band of the same night
Line a day, shelf, local-only draft
Codec rooms — proof without sneering at metaphor
